# Installation

Copy the following files into the repository root:

- `README.md`
- `docs/images/product_overview.png`
- `docs/images/product_funnel.png`
- `docs/images/product_insights.png`
- `docs/images/product_decisions.png`
- `docs/images/recommendation_system.png`
- `docs/images/analytics_architecture.png`

The README already references these relative paths.

## Recommended Git commands

```bash
git checkout -b docs/product-ds-readme
mkdir -p docs/images
# Copy the generated files into the repository.
git add README.md docs/images/
git commit -m "docs: reposition project as Product Data Science case study"
git push -u origin docs/product-ds-readme
```

Review the rendered README on GitHub before merging.
